basic_details.job_title: MNIT Jaipur Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 14 Medical Officers and Specialist Doctors Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Malaviya National Institute of Technology Jaipur (MNIT Jaipur)
basic_details.short_information: Malaviya National Institute of Technology Jaipur (MNIT Jaipur) Medical Officers and Specialist Doctors Notification 2026 has been released on 21 July 2026 on the official website https://www.mnit.ac.in. A total of 14 vacancies have been announced through the MNIT Jaipur Medical Officers and Specialist Doctors Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 65 years for all posts.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS/MD, MBBS/MD/DGO/MS in Gynecology, MBBS/MD/DNB Pediatrics, BAMS, BHMS, BPT/MPT, MBBS/MD in Dermatology, MBBS/MS in Orthopedics, MBBS/MD/DNB in Gastroenterology, MBBS/MD/DM in Cardiology, MBBS/MD/DM in Endocrinology
qualification.details: General Physician: MBBS/MD Gynecologist: MBBS/MD/DGO/MS in Gynecology Pediatrician: MBBS/MD/DNB Pediatrics Ayurvedic Consultant: BAMS Homeopathic Consultant: BHMS Physiotherapist: BPT OR MPT Dermatologist: MBBS/MD in Dermatology Orthopedist: MBBS/MS in Orthopedics Gastroenterologist: MBBS/MD/DNB in Gastroenterology Cardiologist: MBBS/MD/DM in Cardiology Endocrinologist: MBBS/MD/DM in Endocrinology

salary_details.dermatologist: Rs. 4,500 per visit of one hour OR Rs. 7,000 per visit of two hours
salary_details.orthopedist: Rs. 4,500 per visit of one hour OR Rs. 7,000 per visit of two hours
salary_details.gastroenterologist: Rs. 4,500 per visit of one hour OR Rs. 7,000 per visit of two hours
salary_details.cardiologist: Rs. 4,500 per visit of one hour OR Rs. 7,000 per visit of two hours
salary_details.endocrinologist: Rs. 4,500 per visit of one hour OR Rs. 7,000 per visit of two hours

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for MNIT Jaipur Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.mnit.ac.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 11-08-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: MNIT Jaipur Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the MNIT Jaipur Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download MNIT Jaipur Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.event: Last Date for Receipt of Application

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for MNIT Jaipur Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: www.mnit.ac.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 11-08-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for MNIT Jaipur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the MNIT Jaipur Medical Officers and Specialist Doctors posts is 11th August 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Medical Officers and Specialist Doctors at MNIT Jaipur?
faq.answer: There are a total of 14 vacancies for Medical Officers and Specialist Doctors posts released by MNIT Jaipur.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for MNIT Jaipur Recruitment 2026 is Offline.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for the posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the posts is 65 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary structure for the recruited candidates?
faq.answer: The salary ranges from Rs. 40,000 to Rs. 65,000 per month, depending on the post and experience.

faq.question: Q6. What are the required qualifications for the posts?
faq.answer: Qualifications range from MBBS/MD to specialized degrees like MD/DNB Pediatrics, BAMS, BHMS, MPT, and DM in Cardiology/Endocrinology, among others.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for MNIT Jaipur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process includes an Interview and Document Verification.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for MNIT Jaipur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of MNIT Jaipur, www.mnit.ac.in. Links are provided in the Important Links section.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The job type for these positions is Part Time.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for MNIT Jaipur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the MNIT Jaipur Medical Officers and Specialist Doctors posts is 11th August 2026.
